description: Schema for corpus annotation entries. Each file in annotations/ follows this structure.

source.collected_at: ISO date when the original was collected
source.original_hash: SHA-256 of the original (pre-sanitization) config, for integrity without storing raw

classification.vendor: cisco | huawei | h3c | ruijie | hillstone | topsec | dbappsecurity | dptech
features: list of features covered, matching registry.yaml feature names

config.description: what this config does in natural language
known_issues: optional list of known quirks or limitations

expected_translation.high_level: what the translated config should look like
key_lines: critical config lines that must appear in the translation
must_not_contain: patterns that should never appear (e.g., source-vendor commands)

benchmark.case_path: relative path under bench/cases/ if generated
